title: 1 Install R/R Studio

know how to install R and R Studio

title: 1 Install R/R Studio
section: 1.1 What are R and R Studio?
text:
1.1 What are R and R Studio?
R is the programming language we’ll use to import, edit, and analyze data. R Studio is a desktop application with a graphical interface that facilitates programming with R. Basically, R Studio makes using R much easier!

title: 1 Install R/R Studio
text:
1.1.1 Install/Update R

I don’t have R on my computer yet!
Please use Cran to install the newest version of R (version 4.3.1, “Beagle Scouts”). You’ll have to specify your operation system to download the right version:

R for Windows
R for Mac, please read the documentation and installation information here



I have R, but need to update it!
If you already have R installed, you just need to update it to the latest version.

Download and install the newest R version using the links above. (This won’t usually remove your old version—it installs alongside it.)
Open RStudio and go to Tools → Global Options → General.
Under R version, select the newest installed version of R.
Restart RStudio (close and reopen it) so the change takes effect.

title: 1 Install R/R Studio
text:
1.1.2 Install/Update R Studio

I don’t have R Studio on my computer yet!
Next, install R Studio. The newest version of R Studio can be downloaded via this link.


I have R Studio, but need to update it!
If you already have R Studio on your computer, simply make sure to update it to the newest version. The easiest way to do this is via: “Help/Check for Updates” in R Studio.

title: 1 Install R/R Studio
text:
1.2 Why should I learn R?
There are several reasons why I recommend learning R (and similar programming languages like Python) instead of menu-based programs such as SPSS.

R is free. Unlike many other statistical programs, you don’t have to buy it or depend on a university license—which often expires once you leave.
R is open source. That means the source code (the “blueprint” of the software) is publicly available. On top of that, R has thousands of add-on packages—extra tools that provide specialized functions for particular tasks. Most of these packages are available through CRAN (the Comprehensive R Archive Network), and you can install them whenever you need them.
R is flexible. You can work with many different types of data and choose from a huge range of functions to import, clean, visualize, and analyze it. And if a function you need doesn’t exist yet, you can often write your own (or adapt code someone else has shared).
Programming is a valuable job skill. Knowing R (or Python) can strengthen your applications in areas like academia, market research, data science, and data journalism—because many employers expect applicants to be comfortable working with code.

title: 1 Install R/R Studio
text:
📚 More tutorials on this
You still have questions? The following tutorials & papers can help you with that:

YaRrr! The Pirate’s Guide to R by N.D.Phillips, Tutorial 2
Computational Methods in der politischen Kommunikationsforschung by J. Unkel, Tutorial 1
Continuing education in R by Lara Kobilke, Tutorial 2
SICSS Boot Camp by C. Bail, Video 1
wegweisR by M. Haim, Video 1
R Cookbook by Long et al., Tutorial 1

title: 🔷 FAQ R
text:
How do I set my working directory?

setwd()

I get this error…
Solution:
This is it!

setwd(right)

title: 🔷 FAQ Class/exam
text:
Do I need to bring my own laptop to class?
YES


How will I be evaluated?
XXX


How can I sign up for the exam?
Mit der Buchung des Moduls sind Sie gleichzeitig auch für den Leistungsnachweis angemeldet. Sie müssen die Prüfung nicht separat buchen.


How is the exam structured?
In der Prüfung kann prinzipiell alles drankommen, was in der Vorlesung gelehrt wurde, auf der Seite der Begleiterin steht (mit Ausnahme der gekennzeichneten IYI-Zusätze für Interessierte) und was auf den Folien steht (grosse Überschneidung mit der Begleiterin). Desweiteren sind die Antworten in unserem Forum zu berücksichtigen – wobei wir die wichtigsten Q&A auch immer nochmal auf die Seite der Begleiterin packen.


I am a bit afraid of programming and statistics. What do I do?
Wenn Sie in die Vorlesung und die Übung gehen und sich mit den LEF, der Begleiterin und der Zusammenfassung vorbereiten, werden Sie sehr sicher bestehen. Es gibt immer eine gewisse Durchfallquote, aber das sind in der Regel Studierende, die es mit minimaler Vorbereitung einfach mal versuchen.
Wenn Sie grosse Probleme haben, suchen Sie sich bald eine Lerngruppe und fragen Sie in unserem Forum, ob Ihnen ein:e Tutor:in nochmal helfen kann.

title: Appendix
text:
This is an overview of additional material we provide:

In Materials, you can download all necessary data and code.
In Coding style, we provide best practice guidelines for coding.
In Glossary, you can get a useful overview of important functions.
In the GitHub forum, you can discuss questions with others.
In FAQ R, we provide an overview of common R question.
In FAQ Class/exam, we provide an overview of common questions about the class/exam.
